untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking 'multiple consecutive bars close in trade direction' which requires multi-bar historical state (close[1], close[2], etc.). Current schema only supports single-bar prev_* indicators. Also requires thresholds for: confirmation_bars_required, close_position_threshold, volume_multiplier, and consolidation_bar_max which are marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source.
translation_notes: Interpreted 'decisive price action above/below resistance' as close beyond pivot point with strong body (body_pct > 0.6). Volume confirmation mapped to vol_ratio_20 >= 1.0. Exit on reversal through pivot. Cannot precisely model the multi-bar confirmation requirement or dynamically calibrated thresholds without parameter specification.
